name: tibco-vectordb-ingest-documents
title: Ingest Documents
description: Embed text documents and store them in VectorDB in one step. Generates embeddings from raw text using your chosen provider, then upserts the resulting vectors and metadata into the target collection.

display.description: Embed + store documents in one step — ideal for RAG ingestion pipelines

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Select the VectorDB connector (Qdrant, Weaviate, Chroma, Milvus) to store the documents

display.name: Enable Chunking
display.description: Automatically split each document's text into smaller segments before embedding. Eliminates the need for an upstream text-splitting step. Configure the strategy and size below.

display.name: Chunk Strategy
display.description: fixed: sliding character window with overlap | sentence: accumulate sentences up to Chunk Size | paragraph: split on blank lines | heading: split on Markdown headings (ideal for Confluence pages)

display.name: Chunk Size (chars)
display.description: Target chunk length in characters. Used by 'fixed' and 'sentence' strategies. Ignored by 'paragraph' and 'heading'.

display.name: Chunk Overlap (chars)
display.description: Characters shared between consecutive chunks to prevent context loss at boundaries. Only used by 'fixed' strategy. Must be less than Chunk Size.

display.name: Use Connector Embedding Settings
display.description: Inherit the embedding provider, API key, and base URL from the VectorDB connection. Only the model needs to be set below. Requires 'Configure Embedding Provider' to be enabled on the connection.

display.name: Embedding Provider
display.description: API provider used to generate vector embeddings from document text. Leave blank when 'Use Connector Embedding Settings' is enabled.

display.name: Embedding API Key
display.description: API key for the embedding provider. Not required for Ollama or private/open models.

display.name: Embedding Base URL
display.description: Override the default provider URL. OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1 | Azure: full deployment URL | Ollama: http://localhost:11434 | Custom: your endpoint.

display.name: Embedding Model
display.description: Model used to generate vectors. Must match the model used at query time. Examples: text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI), embed-english-v3.0 (Cohere), nomic-embed-text (Ollama).

display.name: Embedding Dimensions
display.description: Output vector size. 0 = model default. Must match the collection's configured vector dimension.

display.name: Default Collection
display.description: Collection to use when the input does not supply one. Can be overridden at runtime.

display.name: Content Field
display.description: Key inside each document object whose value is the text to embed. Defaults to 'text'. Also stored in the payload under this key so retrieval returns the original text.

display.name: Timeout (s)
display.description: Total operation timeout covering embedding call + VectorDB upsert

display.name: Embedding Batch Size
display.description: Number of document texts sent to the embedding API per request. Default 100. Reduce for providers with small payload or strict rate limits (e.g. 20 for free-tier OpenAI).
